lang_common.name: Common
lang_common.description: The trade tongue of the Silvermace Empire and beyond. Most sentient beings speak at least a broken version of it.

lang_low_lesdownian.name: Low Lesdownian
lang_low_lesdownian.description: A non-legacy language spoken primarily by farmers and plebeians in the Lesdownia region.

lang_infernal.name: Infernal
lang_infernal.description: A language of absolute law and hidden cruelty. Used by devils and those brave (or foolish) enough to treat with them.

lang_silvanian.name: Silvanian
lang_silvanian.description: The formal language of the Silvermace Empire's military and nobility.
